label: KING ARTHUR TERRACE TAXI RANK | YEERONGPILLY
notes: Official Brisbane International taxi rank area. Best cab visibility, but likely high crowd pressure because it is close to the main entrance.

label: BEDIVERE STREET RIDESHARE | YEERONGPILLY
notes: Official event rideshare pick-up/drop-off area. Good driver access away from the venue gate, with a longer walk.

label: DEXTER STREET PUBLIC PICKUP | TENNYSON
notes: Official public drop-off/pick-up area for private vehicles. Event guidance says this is not for rideshare or taxis, so use as a backup/private pickup option.

label: GREEN STREET ACCESSIBLE PICKUP | YEERONGPILLY
notes: Official accessible drop-off/pick-up area with event shuttle support. Strong accessibility option, especially when venue parking is unavailable.

label: WILKIE STREET STATION PICKUP | YEERONGPILLY
notes: Near Yeerongpilly station and park'n'ride. Useful as a transport-linked pickup point and fallback if event pickup streets are busy.

label: SOFTSTONE STREET BACKUP PICKUP | TENNYSON
notes: Close backup near a venue access street. Should be checked against event road controls before being treated as a top recommendation.

label: FAIRFIELD ROAD / ORTIVE STREET | YEERONGPILLY
notes: Driver-access fallback via Fairfield Road side. Better for cab approach, but likely busier and less calm for pedestrians.
